title: Express; service, powers of commission
doc_html:
§1167.  Express; service, powers of commission

The commission shall adopt reasonable and just rules, regulations and orders affecting and concerning the service furnished by all persons engaged in doing an express business in Louisiana, and their operation in this state.
doc_text:
§1167.  Express; service, powers of commission
The commission shall adopt reasonable and just rules, regulations and orders affecting and concerning the service furnished by all persons engaged in doing an express business in Louisiana, and their operation in this state.
